productDisplayName: Vans Men Chukka Low Grey Casual Shoes
description: Designed by vans' skate team, this pair of Chukka Low kicks are fashioned for comfort. Without fussy overlays, the low-top pair has an understated urban edge. Team this stylish pair with taupe or grey fitted shorts, capris or denims and polo t-shirts for an instant hit of urban cool. Wear these sockless to evoke the classic style of the early 90's Hollywood fashion. Upper Leather suede and denim uppers for durability and comfort Padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Central lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name on the back Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
